title: Public hearing decision in the case of Oliver Charles Lewin
body: "A judicial Parole Board member, on behalf of the Board’s Chair, has granted the application for Oliver Charles Lewin’s parole hearing to be made public. More information about the reasons for this decision are attached.  The oral hearing has been listed for 18 December 2025. To register to attend this hearing, please email public.hearings@paroleboard.gov.uk for a registration form.  For more detail on applying for a parole hearing to be made public, please read more here: Applying for a Parole review to be public - GOV.UK (www.gov.uk) "
